bodyText:
HEADING1:Turnover Certificate from CA | Virtual Auditor

What is Turnover Certificate from CA | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

Turnover certificate by practising Chartered Accountant. For tender eligibility, MSME, bank, government contracts. Same-day available.
Virtual Auditor provides professional turnover certificate from ca | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.

HEADING2:Our Approach

HEADING2:Offices
Chennai (HQ): G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002. Phone: +91 99622 60333.
Bangalore: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001. Phone: +91 95139 39333.
Mumbai: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062. Phone: +91 77000 89597.
Email: support@virtualauditor.in

Our turnover certificate service provides CA-certified revenue attestation required for tender eligibility, government contracts, bank loans, and regulatory filings. The certificate confirms turnover figures as per audited financial statements for the specified period. Process includes: verification of audited financials, revenue recognition review, turnover computation as per applicable standards (Ind AS 115 / AS 9), certificate issuance on CA letterhead with UDIN (Unique Document Identification Number). Turnaround time is 2-3 working days. Certificates are accepted by government departments, PSUs, banks, and regulatory authorities.
Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

Virtual Auditor brings a unique combination of professional credentials (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer) and technology-driven service delivery. Our digital-first approach enables efficient engagement management with real-time status tracking for clients. We maintain strict confidentiality through secure document handling protocols and encrypted communication channels. Our team provides responsive support with dedicated relationship managers for each engagement. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and a pan-India service capability through our digital infrastructure, we serve clients ranging from startups to listed corporations. Contact us for a free initial consultation to discuss your specific requirements and receive a customized service proposal.
